memoryBonus.title: ❤️ A Moment to Remember
memoryBonus.message: Every adventure has been better because you were beside me. I would choose you all over again.

subtitle: A romantic and funny anniversary slot machine for Sarah from David.
bigline: Spin for chocolate strawberries, travel dreams, Princess Bride romance, and cash gifts from David.
marqueeTemplate: Spin {{spinNumber}} of {{spinCount}} for Sarah's official anniversary result.

welcome.title: Welcome to Sarah's Anniversary Casino
paragraphs: David made this romantic and funny slot machine for Sarah, his favorite travel partner and best adventure.
Expect chocolate covered strawberries, Princess Bride romance, early packing confidence, and a few dad joke laughs.
The Marriage Committee is here as the official funny audit team, but love clearly has the winning hand.
welcome.overrideLine: The Marriage Committee may object, but David, Emma, and Jack already approve this celebration.

scoreboard.title: Anniversary Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: Cash prizes are gifts fulfilled by David, not Playable Greetings.

rules: Cash prizes are gifts from David only.
Playable Greetings does not pay cash prizes.
Any cash prize is fulfilled by David through Zelle.
The Marriage Committee may audit the results, but romance wins anyway.

finale.title: 🎉 Official Anniversary Result
finale.note: Sarah's official result is certified by David and lovingly reviewed by The Marriage Committee.

footer: Made with love for Sarah from David.

customerInputs.oneThingEveryoneKnows: She still laughs at Dad jokes.

claim.template: Cash prizes are gifts fulfilled by David through Zelle. Your anniversary jackpot is waiting. Playable Greetings does not pay cash prizes.

slots.marqueeTemplate: Spin {{spinNumber}} of {{spinCount}} for Sarah's official anniversary result.

prizes.title: Sweet Start
prizes.msg: Sarah wins the opening round of love, laughs, and celebration from David.

prizes.title: Dad Joke Bonus
prizes.msg: Sarah wins ten dollars for still laughing at dad jokes like a true champion.

prizes.title: Love Ticket
prizes.msg: Sarah wins a sweet reminder that the best prize is being loved so well.

prizes.title: Victory Lap
prizes.msg: Sarah wins twenty dollars and a celebration lap approved by the whole family.

prizes.title: Berry Sweet
prizes.msg: Sarah wins chocolate covered strawberry energy and first pick of the best one.

prizes.title: Travel Fund
prizes.msg: Sarah wins twenty dollars toward the next adventure with David by her side.

prizes.title: Early Packer
prizes.msg: Sarah wins official credit for packing three days early and still being right.

prizes.title: Committee Audit
prizes.msg: The Marriage Committee reviews the spin and confirms Sarah is allowed to win.

prizes.title: Audit Overruled
prizes.msg: The Marriage Committee raises a playful objection, but Emma and Jack vote for Sarah.

prizes.title: Memory Treasure
prizes.msg: Sarah wins a special memory message from David.

prizes.title: True Love Bonus
prizes.msg: Sarah wins fifty dollars and a Princess Bride level celebration from David.

prizes.title: Jackpot Winner
prizes.msg: Sarah wins the top one hundred dollar jackpot gift from David through Zelle.
